---
title: "Data Read and Explore"
---

```{r}
#| label: libraries

_______
```


## Read the data

```{r}
hiphop <- ___________
```

## General summaries

```{r}
str(hiphop)
```

```{r}
summary(hiphop)
```

```{r}
# from {dplyr} package
glimpse(hiphop)
```

```{r}
# from {skimr} package
skim(hiphop)
```

## Exploring individual variables

```{r}
hiphop |>
  count(sex)
```

```{r}
hiphop |>
  count(subj, word)
```

```{r}
subjects <- hiphop |>
  distinct(subj,
           .keep_all = TRUE)
```


```{r}
subjects |>
  count(sex)
```

```{r}
subjects |>
  summarize(mean(age))
```

```{r}
subjects |>
  ggplot(aes(x = age)) +
  geom_histogram()
```
